product_updates.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
product_updates.content: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

product_updates.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
product_updates.content: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

product_updates.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
product_updates.content: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

product_updates.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
product_updates.content: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dressed in a blue suit and white shirt, he was rel…

product_updates.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
product_updates.content: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

product_updates.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
product_updates.content: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

product_updates.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
product_updates.content: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

product_updates.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
product_updates.content: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational shopping experience for users.

product_updates.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
product_updates.content: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.

product_updates.title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors
product_updates.content: ElevenLabs reveals new investors, hits $500M ARR, and expands enterprise footprint as voice AI becomes a critical interface.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Widely used Daemon Tools disk app backdoored in monthlong supply-chain attack
technical_breakthroughs.content: Daemon Tools users: It's time to check your machines for stealthy infections, stat.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: inside the Musk v. Altman trial, and AI for democracy
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Week one of the Musk v. technical_breakthroughs.title: Why Reddit blocked my daily visit to its mobile website
technical_breakthroughs.content: Reddit REALLY wants you to use its app.

technical_breakthroughs.title: A blueprint for using AI to strengthen democracy
technical_breakthroughs.content: Every few centuries, changes in how information moves reshape how societies govern themselves. The printing press spread vernacular literacy, helping give rise to the Reformation and, eventually, representative government. The telegraph made it possible to administer vast nations like the US, acc…
